# Auto Signature

Use the Auto-Signature Setup screen
 to define the signature file for specific operators.
Benefits include:

- Operator-specific security attached to the signature file.

- Add-on options selections are available on the standard Accounts
 Payable and Payroll Print Check starting
 screens.

- Define an AP Check limit per operator ID.

[View the Auto Signature Add-On Product Manual](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/0751eeb0-8ea9-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..I85ln_K3IycAIBP5QhIvTor59C_cMSMBxGUBveLu2H0&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22Auto-Signature_Procedures_v1422.pdf%22)
